message:
Merge pull request #1600 from kubestellar/cncf-mission/cri-o-2236-crio-static-build

🌱 cri-o: crio static build

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cri-o-2236-crio-static-build",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cri-o: crio static build",
+    "description": "crio static build. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cri-o deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cri-o version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nhelm list -n cri-o 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cri-o installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cri-o configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cri-o configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nkubectl get configmap -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cri-o\n```\nwe should support a static build for CRI-O so that we don't need to carry dependencies and make it easier to copy the crio binary.\n\nMore information here: https://github.com/rootless-containers/usernetes/issues/19"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for crio static build",
+        "description": "I played around with static cri-o builds and setup a Nix package which produces a 50Mb binary.\nhttps://gist.github.com/saschagrunert/d043c2c8615700b5dae64e967183cc58\n\nSome characteristics:\n- go version go1.12 linux/amd64\n- binary:\n    ```\n    > file result-bin/bin/crio\n    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF\n```yaml\n> file result-bin/bin/crio\n    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (GNU/Linux), statically linked, for GNU/Linux 2.6.32, Go BuildID=wcs6RAOx63B7GLR4ISa6/SuuQZddzDCSqNV1oOKoq/MyRYBEPOHuJdF17Tdc20/JVnN3XJcTYuu_823iLMg, stripped\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade cri-o to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade cri-o:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade cri-o cri-o/cri-o --namespace cri-o\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o\nhelm list -n cri-o\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o\nkubectl get events -n cri-o --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"crio static build\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I played around with static cri-o builds and setup a Nix package which produces a 50Mb binary.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "> file result-bin/bin/crio\n    result-bin/bin/crio: ELF 64-bit LSB executable, x86-64, version 1 (GNU/Linux), statically linked, for GNU/Linux 2.6.32, Go BuildID=wcs6RAOx63B7GLR4ISa6/SuuQZddzDCSqNV1oOKoq/MyRYBEPOHuJdF17Tdc20/JVnN3XJcTYuu_823iLMg, stripped"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "cri-o",
+      "graduated",
+      "runtime",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "cri-o"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/issues/2236",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 13,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with cri-o installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-21T06:16:35.679Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []

+}
